taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
must_have_quals: Masters degree or Bachelors degree + 2 years experience
core_responsibilities: Design and implement full-stack GIS applications, including frontend mapping interfaces and backend services that interact with CAD systems via custom API commands and data exchange protocols, Complete development and testing to simulate and validate real-time GPS data within the GIS environment, Develop and maintain web service platform integrating data processing for internal and external system communication, Maintain and update mobile GIS application used across departments for field operations and on-site spatial validation to support real-time spatial data collection and validation, Own and deliver key modules within the systems, including address validation services, map layer rendering logic, and geolocation workflows, Lead root cause analysis (RCA) for production issues and system anomalies across GIS platforms while serving as the team’s point person for software quality assurance, including identifying long-term solutions and ensuring continuous improvement in code quality and system reliability, Actively manage CI/CD pipelines across all GIS-related projects, integrating build automation, test execution, and deployment workflows, Develop GUI-based automated testing to support regression coverage and catch visual interface issues during continuous integration cycles, Contribute across the full software development lifecycle, requirements analysis, system design, coding, testing, debugging, and documentation, with a focus on spatial accuracy, maintainability, and platform integration
job_summary: Motorola Solutions is a global community dedicated to enhancing safety through technology. They are seeking an Engineer Systems to design and implement full-stack GIS applications, develop web service platforms, and lead software quality assurance efforts.
